reviews.title: Multiple billing and overcharging
reviews.text: The hotel made carious charges to my card after checked-in without my presence. After checked out I continue to receive charges on the card. Now I have to spend time to resolve this problem and get my money back.
reviews.room_type: City View King Room, Guest room, 1 King

reviews.title: I will never return nor recommend this hotel to anyone.
reviews.positives: Good location.
reviews.negatives: That a brand new sweatshirt from Aritzia was taken from my room and the manager did absolutely nothing to help me out. They have video of me carrying the bag into the hotel. My family saw the bag on the floor in the room. Then day of check out it was no where to be found!!! Manager was not helpful. Treated me like I was the problem. Terrible way to treat a customer. I would never claim to have a missing bag if it were not true. I would never recommend this hotel to anyone. I paid around $3600 for 4 nights accommodations. The sweatshirt was $78. The manager offered me 0 compensation. He was more worried about his staff vs his customer. Terrible experience.

reviews.title: Location ok .. room kinda small
reviews.text:
I did lost my stuff inside the room..
But the housekeeping just said that they didnt find it..
reviews.room_type: Midtown Standard King, Guest room, 1 King

reviews.title: Cheating $100 deposit from customer ruined your reputation
reviews.positives: The location is convenient, that’s why I booked it
reviews.negatives:
I was asked to pay extra $100 as despite as well as giving my credit card for record when check in the hotel. The receptionist said the extra deposit will cover extra bills (if I order food in restaurant or use mini bars). The deposit will be refunded to me on day of checking out. 
During my stay, I had breakfast and lunch in the hotel restaurant. I asked about the bills and deductions of the deposit of $100 when I checked out. The receptionist told me my restaurant bills has been deducted from the $100 deposit and the remaining will be credited back to my account. 
After I returned home from NewYork. I found my restaurant bills (around 80 dollars) has been deducted AGAIN from my credit card, there is never a refund of the $100 I paid at the reception when I checked in. 
I emailed the hotel a few times about the refund but never a reply.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
Overall experience was ok.
Room service served food in takeaway packet instead in nice hotel crockery.
reviews.room_type: Skyline View King Room, Guest Room, 1 King

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: I booked via booking and when I arrived, they had no rooms and were sold out. I needed to find a new room at 11pm at night.

reviews.title: Perfect hotel for our first trip to the big city!!
reviews.text: I loved the location of our hotel.  This was our first trip to the big city.  My son used Planet Fitness a few times too.  The staff was amazing, very friendly, as well as the the cleanliness of the rooms and hotel.   We had room service once and it was amazing too.  There was quite a bit of homelessness and drug deals (which we witnessed daily) all around this area.  We also saw this in other parts of the city so unless you take a taxi or Uber right from door to door of where you want to go...not sure it's avoidable.   We LOVED our time in the city though and found New Yorkers to be very kind and friendly.
reviews.room_type: Midtown Two Queen Room, Guest room, 2 Queen

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: I paid through booking the hotel took my card for incidentals and charged me for 2 more full stay amounts & the money has been held for days

reviews.title: Perfect stay
reviews.text: Comfortable rooms and nice views of the city that never sleeps. Facilities are well maintained and the whole hotel holds a stylish decoration that invites you to enjoy the vibrant atmosphere of Renaissance brand.
reviews.room_type: Skyline View King Room, Guest Room, 1 King

reviews.title: Would never stay at that price
reviews.positives: Only location
reviews.negatives: No heat, no room service and not friendly staff

reviews.title: Very friendly staff and good location
reviews.text: Location is great plus checkout is super easy
reviews.room_type: Midtown Standard King, Guest room, 1 King

reviews.title: EPIC FAIL at hospitality! RUBY the WORST front desk EVER
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives:
EPIC FAIL at hospitality! RUBY at front desk is the WORST hotel front desk EVER. I did not feel any hospitality from her. She was cold with no smile, and just plain unpleasant, and obviously in the wrong business.
I had mentioned when making reservation that it was a birthday gift to myself. No birthday wishes whatsoever from Ruby. None.
And when I went back to complain her to manager MATTHEW, he did apologize but again no Happy Birthday wishes. Nor did I receive any small gesture such as cookies and chips (which I have received before from other similar price range NYC hotels which I should have stayed at instead!) So their thoughtlessness and complete fail at simple hospitality gestures have cost them a customer for life! Very disappointed and upset. Wonder how many other guests they have alienated but just not bother to write! I will complain to Marriott upper management

reviews.title: Worth Every Penny – Fantastic Stay at the Renaissance Hotel
reviews.text: I recently stayed at the Renaissance Hotel, and it was worth every penny! From the moment I arrived, I was impressed by the warm and professional service. The rooms were spacious, beautifully decorated, and exceptionally clean. The amenities, including the fitness center and on-site dining, were top-notch. The location was also perfect, with easy access to local attractions. Overall, it was a fantastic stay, and I can’t recommend the Renaissance Hotel enough. I’ll definitely be returning!
reviews.room_type: Skyline View King Room, Guest Room, 1 King

reviews.title: IT WAS A NIGHTMARE AT BEST!!!!!
reviews.positives: Nothing!!!!
reviews.negatives: First off before I made the reservation, the employee taking the reservation told us that valet parking was 90 with in and out privileges and $65 a day for self garage parking with in and out privileges. We get to the hotel and valet comes to the car and informs us that it’s $100 a day and no in and out privileges and $65 a day for self garage parking with no in and out privileges. The second strike was after settling into my room notice that the air was not working good at all. The hotel was all sold out so we could not get another room. Third strike was went to take a shower and the hot water wasn’t working so me and my significant other had to go to my cousins hotel room in same hotel to use his shower!!!!! I’ve informed corporate and they have made a report to hotel and I’m expecting a FULL REFUND AS THIS STAY WAS ABSOLUTELY TERRIBLE!!!!!

reviews.title: Great Service - awesome location.
reviews.text:
From check-in till check-out (stay for 3 nights), everything was fabulous.. 

All staff very nice & helpful, especially to Mike whom taking care our check-in matters,  German whom taking care our check out,  luggage storage matters also help arranging transportation to JFK & Yunior whom borrowed us his own umbrella during rainy day.

We experienced a superb service from the hotel. A very recommended place to spend your holiday in NYC! 💚
reviews.room_type: Standard King Room with Transfer Shower - Mobility Accessible

reviews.title: Terrible
reviews.positives: TERRIBLE
reviews.negatives: The hotel told us they sold out when we travelled 7 hours from another city. They did not notify in advance but rudely told us after we already arrived. The staff named Jasmine however, offered another Non-Chinese guest an available room after cancelling two separate Chinese group of customers. Her behavior was rude and discriminable, causing us huge trouble that night.

reviews.title: 좋습니다
reviews.room_type: Midtown Two Queen Room, Guest room, 2 Queen

reviews.title: SUCKED
reviews.positives: THE ROOM WAS OK BUT THE NOISE LEVEL WAS OFF THE CHARTS.
reviews.negatives: THE ROOM WAS OK BUT THE NOISE LEVEL WAS OFF THE CHARTS. WE ATE THE ROOFTOP RESTAURANT WHERE THE SERVICE WAS POOR, WE GOT MOLDED BREAD ON OUR SLIDERS AND THE BEER WAS FLAT.

reviews.title: 短时间停留可以
reviews.text: 酒店位置不错，走到地铁站很近，而且很多条线，隔音也可以，有遮光窗帘，空调声音确实不小，但这不是重点，重点是他对着你脸狂催，关了又热，住了九天实在不舒服，没有瓶装水，不过最差的是每天的客房打扫，第一天连毛巾都没给，咖啡那些就别提了，打扫更别指望，小费倒是拿的很及时，住了几百家酒店，遇到过最差的客房打扫，非常差！浴室基本没排风，建议同等价位和位置可以试下其它酒店。
reviews.room_type: Midtown Standard King, Guest room, 1 King

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: I paid for a skyline view and didn’t get it

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: انصح بالفندق من ناحية نظافه وموقع قريب من كل شي انصح فيه وبشده
reviews.room_type: Midtown Standard King, Guest room, 1 King

reviews.title: Not very clean and obviously cut corners on maintenance.
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: A heavy piece of long metal fell off the wall near the bed and woke me up in the middle of the night.  The metal was just glued to the wall to hide a roller curtain.  However, it should have been screwed, not just glued.   The metal piece weighted at least 10 pounds so it would have caused signiificant injury if it fell on my face.

reviews.title: I like the room. Make it cleaner!
reviews.positives: Staffs are amazing.
reviews.negatives: I got skin allergies to the bedding for my last night. The sheet was a bit damp.

reviews.title: מומלץ

reviews.title: If you seek a more comfortable stay in terms of noise, choose another place
reviews.positives: Easy to arrive from airport.
reviews.negatives:
Vent in the room was super loud. Our room was looking to a street super crowded. So there was a constant street-noise.

Bed was well-cleaned but the rest of the room was not.

reviews.title: The stay did not wowed us.
reviews.positives: Some of the bell men was excellent. But when first day we drove up to valet they did not even bother to give us a luggage cart. They just kind of stood there , we had lots of things that need to be brought in. When we was about to leave and they brought our car the bell men held on to my keys like he was expecting or waiting for me to give him a tip. He only came out to help when we was about done packing up our things in the car.
reviews.negatives: Better service with the bell men.

reviews.title: Disappointing
reviews.positives: Location, good drinks on bar menu
reviews.negatives: Multiple things broken in the room, including the blind in the bedroom. We couldn’t check-in until 5. Staff were not helpful. Overall we expected a better experience.

reviews.title: Not worth the time or money for an understaffed, overpriced and under/construction hotel
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Hour wait time in lobby, understaffed, Staff who were there were very rude.

reviews.title: Tragic
reviews.positives: 36 floor
reviews.negatives:
Bar was appalling
Noise was insane
Location is slummy

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Great location, rooms well furnished.
reviews.negatives: Aside from the bell men, the service was extremely poor. Not a 4 star hotel service at all, borderline hostel style. For the amount they charge, i expect much better service and professionalism.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Staff is friendly
reviews.negatives: Weed smell everywhere, even in your room. Not easy

reviews.title: It was ok
reviews.positives: Food at the restaurant
reviews.negatives: Was there for two days and most of the restaurant was closed because of a private party. Was asked to relocate like I was not a paying guest of the hotel. Drinks in the restaurant were severely overpriced

reviews.title: Would stay somewhere else.
reviews.positives: Staff was very friendly and accommodating.
reviews.negatives: Very dirty hallways . Security was very poor anyone could walk in and go anywhere in hotel. It was under remodel and did not know that.

reviews.title: Nothing special
reviews.positives: Nothing special
reviews.negatives: Nothing special

reviews.title: Above average

reviews.title: It was ok but I expected more.
reviews.positives: City view
reviews.negatives: The remote control for the TV was very bad. It took hours to change Chanels  on the TV or navigate on Netflix.

reviews.title: HOTEL DIDN’T REVERSE USD 300 SAFE DEPOSIT
reviews.positives: Rooms are great, location as well, the concierge is amazing, also the restaurant, but it’s been 10 days since I’m back and you still hasn’t reversed my safe deposit. GIVE ME MY SAFE DEPOSIT BACK.
reviews.negatives:
They asked for a USD 150 safe deposit when I got there and I gave a debit card, so I had USD 150 blocked for my use. When I saw that, I asked for a reversion to do it in a credit card, so I understood that I had to tap the card again. 
At the end, I had USD 300 blocked from the debit card and USD 150 from credit. USD 450 in total and they told me it will reverse after check out. At that time I talked to the manager since this is not switching cards it’s only blocking even more money.
It’s been 10 days that I’m back, they did the reversion on credit card and USD 300 SAFE DEPOSIT it’s still blocked on my debit card. 
CAN YOU RETURN MY MONEY????

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.negatives: No parking available

Decor. 
Bar.

reviews.negatives:

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Room was spectacular.
reviews.negatives: No breakfast on weekends... at that price, really ?

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Location - nice staff
reviews.negatives: Long wait for elevators - low shower pressure

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: I liked the view from that room
reviews.negatives: I didn’t like it when I came back to my room the room service didn’t exchanged my bedsheet because I could see the spot from yesterday that was left , if i am paying so much money to stay at somewhere decent than it should be fair enough for the bedsheets to be clean , I was very disappointed and felt disgusted to sleep on the bed but I had no choice .

reviews.title: I dont think, i want to come back, probably choose another option, doent worth the money
reviews.positives: Location is fine.
reviews.negatives: Elevators are weird, and not enough. Only one small bottle of water in the room.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.negatives: We’ve stayed there before and our room this year was really run down. The sink only had hot/warm water, not cold. Carpet was gross and dusty.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Loved the location.
reviews.negatives:
Broken bathroom faucet in our bathroom and more importantly the cleaning lady let the door slam at least 15 times while clean the adjacent room. It was early in the morning and I stuck my head out of our door and said we are still sleeping can you prop the door open? She continued to let it slam so I got up. 
I did make a complaint at the front desk which I never do but unfortunately this was annoying asleep or not!

reviews.title: A bit expensive, but good rooms
reviews.positives: Great hotel, comfy bed, beautiful washroom and spacious rooms.
reviews.negatives: The location was ghetto at night, there were homeless people around who stole things from us.

reviews.title: Ok
reviews.negatives: The rooms smelled and hall smelled not fresh  like old dirty laundry

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The location was excellent.
reviews.negatives: The room is too small, there was no enough space to move around or to organize the luggages.

reviews.title: Nice but could be better
reviews.positives: The noise coming from outside

reviews.title: Good value for NYC, fine for a one night stay, but wouldn’t stay here again.
reviews.positives: The room itself was very spacious— by NY standards and a great view.
reviews.negatives:
Grungy neighborhood near penn station.
Really loud music everywhere in the hotel: elevators, lobby, restaurant, bars— plural. There was no quiet place to sit and have a drink. I took my cocktail back to my room.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: location is convenient
reviews.negatives: Quite noisy, the glass window does not block noises from the busy street.

reviews.title: Good location, good price, could use attention to detail.
reviews.positives: The Bell desk gentlemen are exceptionally kind and courteous. Give them a raise. They are the face of your business and do a great job.
reviews.negatives: Rooms are well decorated but the cement ceiling gave us the creepy feeling we were in a basement. The plastic coffee maker and plastic pods are SO bad for your health and I wish it was not all plastic because we crave coffee before getting out of pajamas.

reviews.title: Wonderful location, but got overcharged by hotel
reviews.positives:
The room was wonderfully large and spacious for NYC. 
Cleaners were wonderful! They speak Spanish so it helps if you’re not ready for them to clean your room that you can reply in Spanish. Room cleaned every day.
Hotel is so close to everything and on the same street/ block as some of the best bagel stores.
Less than 5 mins walk to Madison Sq Garden.
1 min to Macy’s on foot (34th street)

The staff as soon as you walk into the hotel were exceptional.
The bed felt like a big hug.
Having a refrigerator in the room was a plus.
reviews.negatives:
Check in is on the 6th floor, so you have to grab the elevator to check in.
You do not pay for your room upon arrival but at the end of the stay.
It’s already expensive to stay in NYC and this was over thanksgiving so even more, but since it was my first thanksgiving here, I was fine with the cost of the hotel on here. But to my surprise, I got overcharged (once there and then again at the end which was more than what the final cost was on here) and to make matters worse, the staff have been reluctant in helping me rectify this; and it hurts personally because I also work in hospitality and the customer service has not been of excellence in this situation. They wouldn’t provide a forwarding email so that I could share the payments with them and despite my emails and going to see them repeatedly, I was passed onto people who were either in meetings or didn’t call me back and it really ruined my experience of what I thought was a great hotel.

reviews.title: Comfortable.
reviews.positives:
Good location. Nice to come back to given the location. Good security measures.
Room was a good size. Bathroom was very clean. There was an iron and a hairdryer.
reviews.negatives:
The location. The street is not that well lit. 
The surfaces were not cleaned thoroughly enough . 
Would change the linens etc every day which is quite wasteful.  There was no option to reuse linens.

reviews.title: The hotel was beautiful, comfortable, affordable, and a great location for me I definitely would ret
reviews.positives: I liked the complimentary beverages I had water and I liked the option to lock up our belongings until check in time was very helpful!
reviews.negatives: Not too many signs around showing where the restaurant was and the ice machines were hard to find at first and no microwaves anywhere!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Good location, confortable bed, and nice staff.
reviews.negatives: Unfortunately, after a long flight from Europe, I had to wait 2 hours for the room, and the for some reason the top head shower (which is very high, near the roof) was full of hairs, so I had to clean it cause I didn’t wanted to wait more time for another room.

reviews.title: Good bed, good staff mid-town hotel
reviews.positives: The bed was very comfortable.  the view from the room was beautiful.  the staff was very helpful.
reviews.negatives: Scaffolding covering the entrance of the hotel made the entrance not pleasant and the lobby was on the 6th floor which made the arrival not very hospitable.  In the bedroom the air-conditioning came on and off all night long and was disturbing.  The shower floor was very slippery but there was a bar to hold.  The bed was set on a wood piece that had an edge and thus a different level than the carpet and  when getting out of the bed it was annoying during the night.   There was a loud rock band that we could hear until 10:45 pm on our one night there.  It was not in the hotel and the staff helped look for the source.  We could not figure out where it was coming from.

reviews.title: A very expensive stay with no hot water
reviews.positives: This hotel is very conveniently located
reviews.negatives: There was a gas leak which affected hot water throughout the area; it would have helped to receive communications about it from the hotel. The Renaissance could also have comped breakfast or done something for guests to apologize for the inconvenience

reviews.title: Clean but not comfortable stay.
reviews.positives: Clean and good views
reviews.negatives:
The street is not comfortable. There were group of homeless people every night  getting ready to sleep at same spot and probably because they pee all around it smelled so bad further down the hotel entrance. Also we didn’t like the trucks stopping by next door for wood recycling during working hours.
No kettle, no hot water given before opening hours of the restaurant eventhough there were already staff getting ready to open up. Hotel reception didn’t help at all. 7.30 is too late for starting service.

reviews.title: We had a nice time at the hotel and everything is within walking minutes. I would stay there again.
reviews.positives: We liked how the staff was very accommodating. We did enjoy having the free water and beverages especially during the hot humid week we were there.
reviews.negatives: Though the restaurant was nice and good food, I wish there was an upscale one on the property. The shower floor was very slippery I almost fell. Had to get a shower mat.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: easy, efficient, location, price,
reviews.negatives: needs renovation,  small room

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: the room service is slow! I asked for more tissue boxes for two days but nobody refill it.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The room was a decent size, with a spacious bathroom. The elevator system worked well, once we got used to it! Great Midtown location.
reviews.negatives: Carpets a bit dated and worn, but it was clean and tidy.

reviews.title: I would stay again.but it’s to expensive not to have at least a microwave and continental breakfast
reviews.positives: It was nice and close to the event and shopping and easy access to food
reviews.negatives: No microwave for all the money you pay you should be able to heat your food

reviews.title: It was our honeymoon and we made the best out of it! We look forward to visiting again!
reviews.positives: It was in the heart of a everything! Most things were in walking distance. The staff were friendly.
reviews.negatives: Saturday night - Monday, there was a power surge that caused half of the room to not have any power and we had to charge our phones up in the bathroom. I also didn’t like how the staff tried charging my card for the total stay amount $1450- $1660 again. Their staff did make up for it by allowing us to just pay the difference that was owed for the room service. Other than that, it was a beautiful hotel.

reviews.title: High quality 4 star in the heart of Manhattan!
reviews.positives: Stayed here for a week - really great location. The bed was wonderful, bathroom amenities by Aveda were great, in room dining was great, room service room was really good too! Also they have a smart TV in the room which was helpful. Fantastic view from the 33rd floor! Highly recommended.
reviews.negatives: I got charged $11 for two bottles of water (not sure why water wasn’t free).

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Very convenient to transit and theatre. Not a great location and of itself. Fast elevators.

reviews.title: Great Location
reviews.positives: The views in our room were absolutely stunning.
reviews.negatives: I did not like that after our first night our room was not cleaned!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The view was GREAT! Romm comfortable and location perfect for my needs. Although it was pricey it was worth it. Only downside was breakfast wasnt served early enough for our check out

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Location, upscale vibe , bar, restaurant, room
reviews.negatives: Slow elevator service, bar and restaurant closed at 10:30pm,

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: It seemed like you should need to swipe your key at the elevator to get to floors where guests stay- did not like that aspect.  Anyone could go to any floor.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Convenient location once you get there.  Very easy to drive out of though.  Loved that it had parking.
reviews.negatives: I hated the bathroom door.  Glass?  Really?!  Barn door and glass?!  You can see and hear everyone on the toilet.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Tiny room

reviews.title: Great location and staff.
reviews.positives: Proximity to msg, friendly staff
reviews.negatives: Elevators…. Need some type of system for once it gets busy…

reviews.title: Pleasant
reviews.positives: Clean and location was great
reviews.negatives: The staff is not very accommodating or friendly

reviews.title: Stay was fine with the exception of the shortcomings mentioned above
reviews.positives: The view from the room was great. Reception and other hotel personnel very helpful. Location central. Close to Times Square but not so close that the crowds bother you when you come out of the hotel. And close to Penn Station and subway stops.
reviews.negatives: The old fashioned air conditioning heating at some point started blowing cold air instead of warm air. Despite two visits of the building engineer, it was not fixed. Hotels in NY should better invest in modernizing their facilities and not just ask for incredibly high rates for their aging hotels given what they offer. Coffee in the room and the coffee machine could be better and preferably [;ace a Nespresso machine, not cheap filter machine. Another thing I didn't like so much was the fact that the walls did not seem plastered and painted though I learnt from the manager that it was done so purposefully. It may be personal, but I thought I booked a room in a hotel in Manhattan not in a museum of modern art...

reviews.title: Great for a night or two for concert goers
reviews.positives: The location 3 minutes walk to MSG and the food at the restaurant Versa
reviews.negatives: The excessively small size of the room and the price

reviews.title: In town for 2 nights . . . good hotel and would consider staying here again
reviews.positives: Location is good.  Easy walking access to many midtown sites.  Staff was always very helpful.  Room was small but AC was excellent and everything very functional.  Loved the quiet too!
reviews.negatives: Room was very small.  Perhaps 170 sq. feet.

reviews.title: Conveniently located.  Felt safe   Bed was comfortable
reviews.positives: Location

reviews.title: Very good hotel in an excellent location.
reviews.positives: Clean, not crowded, speedy elevator and excellent reception desk team.
reviews.negatives: Construction was going with drilling causing noise for a few hours during the day. No warning was given.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Great location!

reviews.title: Great location, decent value, service could be better.
reviews.positives: Location was great, rooms and views were great.
reviews.negatives: Service was a bit poor, we tried to check in early and they told us they didn't have any rooms available at 3, which was fine. They told us they would contact us if any rooms came available early. We waited until past the checkin time at 4 and still didnt receive a call, so we had to wait to check in late. Kind of annoyed that we were told we'd be contacted and that didn't happen. Felt like they didn't care about us. The bathroom in the lobby was also filthy when I went in to use it. The bathroom in the room was also a bit dirty, sink was cracked.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Modern and cool look and feel
Great location
Good sports bar and terrace

reviews.title: Walking distance to MSG, ESB, Broadway, and Times Square
reviews.positives: The location was in walking distance of Times Square and other places.
reviews.negatives: The view wasn't what we expected, and the bathroom floor was very slippery due to the shower and floor being the same. We had to purchase shower shoes to avoid an accident.

reviews.title: Solid location, clean, chic and comfortable with a helpful staff.
reviews.positives: It was fine and as I expected. With regards my room, it was spacious and comfortable. The bathroom was really nice and I like the shower in particular.
reviews.negatives: The elevator system was annoying but I felt very safe given the layout of the property.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The rooms were nice and clean, location is awesome!
reviews.negatives: Service was sometimes a bit under than expected.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Room small

reviews.title: Lovely room
reviews.negatives: I thought I had paid for breakfast so deliberately didn’t eat there . It was expensive enough

reviews.title: Nice hotel for a two night getaway
reviews.positives: Very close to Penn Station.
reviews.negatives: We weren't prepared for a concrete ceiling and wall in our room. The bathroom sink faucet and knobs were loose.

reviews.title: Overall Great Experience!! Book It!!
reviews.positives: The hotel's location is in a prime area!! 10 minutes or less walking to main attractions.
reviews.negatives: The wall lamps and electrical sockets on one wall didn't work.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Good Midtown hotel. Good but probably will choose elsewhere next time we're in town for a show. The pain points were 

1. Elevators. Way too few for such a large hotel. Wait times aren't great at peak times.
2. Gym. Planet fitness is cool but not what I expect for a 4 star hotel gym, should be private with a view

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Great location, all the sights are more or less 10-15 mins away by train. Very nice view.
reviews.negatives:
The rooms with the couches like in the pictures are rare. Because I wanted the one with a couch we were given a different room but it was very small.

The bathroom doesn’t have a door just a glass barrier, so it might be uncomfortable to share a room with a friend.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The staff Duke Perkins and crew on duty from 15 to 17 February 2025, were superb, wonderful, friendly and hospitable. The location and room is good, will definitely come back.
reviews.negatives: There is no toothbrush, toothpaste provided for this 4 star hotel. Everything else was good. Left luggage service was friendly but it's need tipping and although it's part of hotel's service.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The location is perfect and check in and check out process is very seamless. The room is of a good size, new and well maintained. Also the bathroom is spacious (for NYC standards)
reviews.negatives: The cleaning logistics is not very effective, depending on what tie you leave the room in the morning and return in the afternoon. No hangers for coats , which is important during winter.

reviews.title: Recommended for your New York visit
reviews.positives: Location and quality

reviews.title: Everything was great!  Great stay
reviews.positives: Staff was excellent. Property was very clean and location was great.
reviews.negatives: The room smelt funny almost like Body odor

reviews.title: Great location for our first trip to New York
reviews.positives: Centrally located with easy access to subway, Penn.Station and walking to many sites. Room was fairly spacious and bed was very comfortable.
reviews.negatives: Check- in process was pretty disorganized and there were very few places to put away clothes.

reviews.title: Nice place. Take care of your stuff.
reviews.positives: Estruture is great. location is really nice.
reviews.negatives: Forgot an expensive jacket there. It just disappeared there when we got back.

reviews.title: Very nice hotel, would stay there again.
reviews.positives: The view from the room, courtesy of staff, cleanliness.
reviews.negatives: Breakfast was not served, a bit pricey.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The hotel is good, it is near the metro. The room is not so big, but it is a reasonable size for NYC. The bathroom and shower were good and bed was comfortable.
reviews.negatives: The region near Times Square is not the best, too crowded. The hotel is very loud as well, but luckily the rooms were quiet.

reviews.title: Good stay
reviews.positives: Friendly and professional staff. Convenient to the subway and some good restaurants. We very much appreciated the unlimited free water bottles and bar soap with virtually no scent. Nicely appointed room with enough horizontal space to put luggage and other belongings. We appreciated the quiet mini fridge in the closet. The elevators worked well. The bed was moderately comfortable.
reviews.negatives: I realize we are in a huge city, but this location seemed particularly noisy. The location was also in a bit of a sketchy area; we were on high alert. Not a fan of having a glass (even though it is "frosted") bathroom with a barn door that doesn't seal.

reviews.title: Comfortable stay in excellent, central location
reviews.positives: Was very happy staying here, with its proximity to Penn Station and most subway lines. You have some popular food options outside your door, such as Liberty Bagels and Sushi 35. The rooms are designed well and optimized for convenience and usability — one of the rare experiences where all the amenities in a room were perfectly executed. The hotel is all-around excellent value.
reviews.negatives: Check-in was late and rooms generally weren’t available earlier.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: It is centrally located. The rooms are spacious by NYC standards, clean and comfortable.
reviews.negatives: The elevators can take a long time to reach you, but are efficient once they do.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The size of the room is very good. The bathroom is new, clean and spacious. The toiletries were very good quality. Loved the fact that the floor was not 100% carpet (hate carpets!).
reviews.negatives: I wish the elevators only worked when tapping the keycard to access the room floors. Anyone seems to access the room floors, which is not nice. Despite great location, the street where the hotel is located (35th) is so filthy, and a little scary depending on the hours. Once I checked in, I only used the door that gives access via 34th Street, but you can only access the hotel via 34th once you have the key.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Location is great! The bed was very comfortable.

reviews.title: It was pleasant stay
reviews.positives: I have business meeting near Korean town so it was the best location
reviews.negatives: I booked the skyview room but it feel smaller than last time when I booked the regular room

reviews.title: I had an amazing stay
reviews.positives: Gym convenience view from room
reviews.negatives: No roof access

reviews.title: Beautiful view from the heart of the Big Apple.
reviews.positives: Clean, beautiful view, comfortable bed, great area to set up a workstation, close to Penn Station.
reviews.negatives: Confusing name.  Accidentally walked to the wrong hotel.  Hard to find the hotel entrance.  Elevators were tricky to operate.  They didn’t reliably register touches with your finger.  On the last day, we were shown a trick to use your keycard or your knuckle instead of your finger.

reviews.title: Clean and relaxing modern hotel in the heart of NYC.
reviews.positives: Location is very central and walkable. The room was very clean and everything looked just as expected. Comfortable bed, nice shower and terrific views. The lounge is a great addition with sitting space and complimentary soft drinks, great for taking a break in the bustle of NYC.
reviews.negatives: The elevator service was very inconvenient. You have to choose which floor you are going to when you call the elevator, but we had to wait about 10 minutes every time we called it. Also, Nespresso pods in the room would be a big plus.

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel with nice city views! Very clean
reviews.negatives: We couldn’t check in at the usual time because the staff was behind and our room wasn’t ready so that was a bit inconvenient but the lounge was nice to wait in.

reviews.title: Nice place to be for my quick trip in NYC.
reviews.positives: Great location
reviews.negatives: My room shades didn’t work well, and there was lots of dust and debris around the window. Didn’t get info about pillow choices till 4:30 am! No one explained how to use the elevator! Dirty out front!

reviews.title: I had a great time. Prime location and very clean
reviews.positives: It was clean and neat
reviews.negatives: There was a piece of the sink broken

reviews.title: Lovely stay
reviews.positives: Location was great

reviews.title: Great hotel and nice staff
reviews.positives: Great hotel and very clean. Amazing staff
reviews.negatives: My key wasn’t working so I had to come up and down  multiple times to get it fixed. Took an hour to get everything fixed and get engineers involved. Elevators are really slow too so every time my key card wouldn’t work I had to wait 2-3 mins for an elevator to go down. They offered me to sit in their “premium lounge” while I waited and were very polite and apologized for the inconvenience but I would expect in a situation like this, I would have been given more perks like points or discounts. It was a little ridiculous because it happened at 10pm and I had an early morning next day so losing that one hour was a little too much

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Nice location
reviews.negatives: Nice views

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Location was good
reviews.negatives: View was just fine

reviews.title: Excellent location, proper bedding, good amenities,
reviews.positives: All was well.  The one issue I had was promptly handled as best they could.  I came back to my room and smelled smoke i.e. cigarettes.  I don't smoke.  Phoned the Guest Services and in all a room above or below was smoking and I was not the only one to complain.  They did offer another room.
reviews.negatives: Noise from the street, but that can't be helped.

reviews.title: It was a great staycation
reviews.positives: The room + the view
reviews.negatives: No pool, hot tub or gym (to my knowledge)

reviews.title: Worth the cost x benefit
reviews.positives:
The room met all expectations for our quick trip.
The room is very cozy, with space for the husband to put his suitcase.
The location was perfect for our schedule. Close to the metro and main points of the city.
reviews.negatives: The only thing I didn't like was the cold water for showering in the morning.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Room was large and comfortable. Location was great.
reviews.negatives: Bathroom light was broken. I was told someone would come but they never did. Shower head would not turn off.

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel wish it had its own facilities just for guests
reviews.positives: Beautiful hotel - well designed and furnished. A nice oasis in NYC
reviews.negatives: I didn’t like that the gym was technically the planet fitness next door. And it wasn’t 24 hrs.

reviews.title: confortable stay
reviews.positives: staff, cleaning, spacious room
reviews.negatives: not pretty block, blackout curtains were scratched

reviews.title: Perfect location for the most part quiet
reviews.positives: Location location location
reviews.negatives: Prices

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Great location, comfortable room (for NYC). Interesting decor! We also had a great evening dessert at Versa.
reviews.negatives: The bathroom had no actual door, just a sliding glass panel that did not fully close the entrance. And the bathroom was separated from the rest of the room by a glass panel, though fortunately a blind could be pulled down for privacy. Cool design, yes. Practical, no.

reviews.title: Great hotel with great location
reviews.positives: Hotel was awesome. Great location, bar in the lobby to have a drink after walking around the city
reviews.negatives: I don’t know if the issue was with booking.com or hotels system, but when I tried to check-in they were not able to find my reservation. Luckily they gave me a room at the same rate and everything was fine!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The hotel was great - decent size rooms and bathrooms. The hotel was up to date and had a modern vibe.
reviews.negatives: Housecleaning entered our room without knocking and announcing themselves late in the afternoon while we were changing our clothes to go to an event.  This was quite disturbing.

reviews.title: Overall was great! Very spacious room
reviews.positives: It’s close to everything in NYC
reviews.negatives: Vallet parking it’s too expensive

reviews.title: Overall and excellent stay!
reviews.positives: The location of the hotel is excellent, staff is friendly and the hotel is clean and well organized.
reviews.negatives: The breakfast wasn't great in the hotel restaurant. The offer was decent, though the taste wasn't there.

reviews.title: Very happy that we chose this hotel
reviews.positives: Location is perfect. Many attractions and good restaurants around. Right next to subway and train station. Very clean. Reasonable room size.  Nice interior
reviews.negatives: The exhaust fan in bathroom is not working

reviews.title: Great stay in a very convenient location
reviews.positives: Clean and spacious room with good in-room facilities and a nice view. Very central location, making it easy to get around the city. Friendly and helpful staff throughout the stay.

reviews.title: Perfect hotel with great location
reviews.positives:
The location is great and hotel has with two separate entrances from different streets.
The bathroom cosmetics were excellent quality and pleasantly surprising. 
The room was spacious, with a very comfortable bed.
reviews.negatives: On the 14th floor, the carpeted floors near the elevator were noticeably dirty throughout our stay.

reviews.title: high quality hotel in center of NY and perfect base for discovering this amazing city
reviews.positives: Location is perfect to discover NY and right next to train station and important tourist places. Rooms are not the largest, but offer good quality amenities and we enjoyed a view over NY on a higher floor
reviews.negatives: Sound isolation of doors could be better, and you can hear neighbors sometimes, which is unfortunate for the price paid.  Other than that nothing to complain about

reviews.title: Girls trip in December it was fabulous !! The event coordinator at the front desk was so plessnt
reviews.positives: Location was great !! Nice hotel, clean and comfortable !

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Great location, staff were helpful, room with city view was very nice
reviews.negatives: One time we didn’t have hot water in the shower however it was fixed within half an hour.

reviews.title: It was a great trip in spite of the snowy and cold weather.
reviews.positives: The room was very comfortable, and the location was good for us to be able to get around to the sights that we planned to visit.  We would definitely consider staying here again.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The staff was very accommodating when we were stranded for an extra night due to a winter storm and flights were cancelled. The location was great!
reviews.negatives: There were not enough outlets/plugs near beds and the sliding glass bathroom doors became annoyingly noisy. When someone used the restroom, the whole room lit up.

reviews.title: Not cheap, but high-quality, bring a sleeping mask.
reviews.positives: Clean, modern, updated. Comfortable.
reviews.negatives: My only criticism is that the bathroom is surrounded by glass, which means that in the middle of the night if someone uses the bathroom and switches on the light, it lights up the whole room. It’s a style design choice that looks sharp, but is not practical. Luckily I had a sleeping mask.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.negatives: Only the elevator is very annoying, but there is nothing to do about it.

reviews.title: Helpful staff and great access to the heart of NYC
reviews.positives: Great location

reviews.title: See you again!
reviews.positives:
Modern, clean, perfect location 
Free bottle of water!!
Great service attitude

reviews.title: Pleasant
reviews.positives: Close to all things good in Midtown
reviews.negatives: Sign was hard to spot because of scaffold.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Food was excellent 
Security was great
Location was close to everything we wanted to walk to or catch the subway
reviews.negatives:
In room coffee was not good.
Room was very expensive 
Elevator one time had to be called over and over until we ended up taking the stairs

reviews.title: Very comfortable and absolutely clean room central to everything.
reviews.positives: Clean, central location
reviews.negatives: When we left we made arrangements with bell staff for a ride to airport, we got 2 blocks from hotel when police surrounded the car and the driver and car were taken it was an illegal car serve,police tried to get us a cab and were very polite and informed us of the problem, but we ended up going back to  we told the Bell service of the issue they had another car fro the same serous asked for a yellow cab, as we were driving down from the hotel the car from that service was also stopped by the police.

reviews.title: Absolutely memorable 🥰
reviews.positives: The proximity to MQG and other iconic sites which were within walking distance.
reviews.negatives: The ground lobby/exits were too plain unattractive.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Central to everything
reviews.negatives: It was a little pricey

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
The location and views are always nice.
I appreciate the close distance to Penn Station! And facilities are very modern now.

reviews.title: Great hotel
reviews.positives: Location and food!
reviews.negatives: Very pricey for such a small room

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Good location

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Very Nice staff clean hotel convenient location  good views
reviews.negatives: Tub filled up with water while showering because the drain was clogged

reviews.title: Amazing!
reviews.positives: Rooms weren’t super small. Customer service was always helpful.
reviews.negatives: Loved the property, wish we could’ve stayed longer.

reviews.title: Well priced, comfortable room, great Penn Station area location
reviews.positives: Carefully designed rooms, great location near Penn Station and newly revived neighborhood

reviews.title: Excellent hotel and great value!!
reviews.positives:
Great location and overall very nice property.
Looks recently renovated. Rooms were super clean and modern. Nice aesthetics.
The free access to Planet Fitness gym right next door is a major plus for fitness people!!
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Great place to stay when exploring NYC
reviews.positives: A combination of excellent location, helpful staff and privacy made this place an enjoyable stay. Close penn station and striking distance to any sites you wanted to see.
reviews.negatives: View was mediocre from our room and pool was crowded

reviews.title: Quiet accommodations in a super convenient part of town
reviews.positives: Great location and a great view from my room.  I was happy that despite the location being quite busy, the room was actually very quiet and felt sufficiently distanced from the activity below.  It was also nice that the lobby was above the ground level so it felt like it was cleaner and quieter than if it was right off the street.

reviews.title: Had a wonderful time, everyone was great, and the location was perfect!
reviews.positives: View was amazing, the room was nice and clean.
reviews.negatives: The bathroom didn’t have privacy screens, and that would have been a nice option.

reviews.title: Convenient location, excellent friendly staff, would stay again
reviews.positives: Very convenient location in mid-town. Exceedingly friendly and helpful staff.
reviews.negatives: Walls seem a little thin - neighbor on the phone woke us in the middle of the night.

reviews.title: Excellent stay, will be back!
reviews.positives: Central location, helpful staff, good-sized rooms, housekeeping support late into the evening

reviews.title: Great comfortable rooms in an excellent location.  Far enough away to be quiet at night, but close enough to everything
reviews.positives: The rooms were great, had a king with skyline view, bed was very comfortable, delivered the extra pillows I requested. Desk staff were very friendly and helpful.
reviews.negatives: The maid service was spotty, and when we did get it, it was lacking attention to detail.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Excellent location, great room. Loved walking around the neighborhood.
reviews.negatives: Nothing. Everything was excellent

reviews.title: Great location and service. Awareness about the size that is small.
reviews.positives: Lover the location, it also has a great service and clean efficient room service.
reviews.negatives: Room is a little small for the price.

reviews.title: Fun place to stay in midtown
reviews.positives: Perfect location after arriving via Penn Station.
reviews.negatives: I'd prefer solidly-closing bathroom doors rather than the sliding ones that leave a big gap.

reviews.title: Perfect hotel for NYC visit
reviews.positives:
Good size rooms. 
Friendly staff 
Good location

reviews.title: great stay!
reviews.positives: clean rooms and close proximity to Penn Station.

reviews.title: Excellent location
reviews.positives: Fantastic breakfast

reviews.title: We had a lovely stay.
reviews.positives: The room and bathroom were very clean. Shower was great. Nice rain forest shower head and good water pressure.Beautiful view.
reviews.negatives: Nothing outrageous. I would stay there again. However, I requested extra towels in advance but did not get them. There was only hand lotion and soap near sink. This is the Renaissance brand. No other amenities like cotton swabs, shower cap.

reviews.title: Wonderful. Will go again.
reviews.positives: Location and helpful/friendly staff.
reviews.negatives: Would prefer to leave cash tip for housekeeping vs a QR code/app.

reviews.title: Great location in heart of midtown, spacious and highly comfortable stay.
reviews.positives: Room was spacious and overall modern and well-maintained. Daily housekeeping service was always consistent, and overall hotel staff were very accommodating with early check-ins and one-off asks.
reviews.negatives: Some aspects of the hotel room were dated, such as missing floor covering over parts of the floor, or cracks in some of the leather seating.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Excellent location for NYC 
Clean and tidy with an excellent staff!!! Customer service was superb!

reviews.title: Christmas Getaway
reviews.positives:
The staff was kind. The service was good especially on the 6th floor bar. Loved the location.
Room was small but comfortable, clean and modern. Had all the essentials in the room.
reviews.negatives: The room was extremely noisy when trying to sleep at night. Because of glass windows, the heater took longer to warm up the room. The bar closed early. Should have extended hours during the holidays especially if there are guests enjoying   themselves no matter what day of the week. The breakfast was a little bit overpriced.

reviews.title: Excellent location and amazing helpful staff
reviews.positives: It’s centric location! Have easy access to subway and any walking distance to major attractions!
reviews.negatives: The rooms are too small for the price you pay

reviews.title: Excellent hotel. I would definitely love to stay there again
reviews.positives: View from the windows was terrific !
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Good Midtown Hotel next to Penn Station
reviews.positives:
Location
Employees
View
reviews.negatives: Small rooms

reviews.title: Fun stay in the city
reviews.positives: Comfortable room, nice location to local restaurants, quick walk to Times Square, friendly staff and great rooftop restaurant

reviews.title: Very Demure Experience
reviews.positives:
The rooms are really neat and the view from the room, exceptional. 
The bathrooms are also lovely n spacious.
Initially had an issue with first room I was given and i am glad that they eventually decided to switch my room as I was staying longer days.

reviews.title: Worth it.
reviews.positives: Once inside, it’s very nice. Clean, has attention to detail in terms of construction. The lobby is modern and comfortable. The room was beautiful. Very clean, again modern, and I could see myself living in it. Service was exceptional. They held my bag for me, before I checked in and after I checked out, so I could explore the city without being weighted down. The concierge was gone for the day, but the receptionist stepped up to help me.
reviews.negatives: When I went, construction workers as occurring outside. There were some homeless near the entrance. The entrance bellhop was there or not there, and depending on who it was, just held the door open the entire time they were there.

reviews.title: Highly recommend! Worth your money. Very close to Penn station.
reviews.positives: Great skyline view. Super clean room. Spacious.
reviews.negatives: View is heartbreaking! Free bottles of water. Very clean room. Aveda cosmetics in bathroom.

reviews.title: Nice and elegant long weekend in Cincy downtown
reviews.positives: Location, clean and elegant hotel. Walking distance to lots of restaurants and bars in both directions, towards the river and downtown. has a nice lounge bar that opens late
reviews.negatives: It was a bit pricey but, you are in downtown, if you don't have car I think evens out because no need to pay parking

reviews.title: It different when you staying in downtown
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Near every things

reviews.title: My wife and I came to attend the Aladdin show it was super close and had a smooth stay
reviews.positives: I loved the cleanliness and location was great
reviews.negatives: No complaints

reviews.title: Fantastic time in NY,  no complaints
reviews.positives: Location mostly.  The room was nice.
reviews.negatives: Everything was good.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Great Staff
reviews.negatives: Restaurant staff

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The hotel is great with an amazing view. The staff is really polite and very helpfull. We will be back soon.

reviews.title: Wonder staff. Great view. Comfy room! Great location!
reviews.positives: Staff were amazing! Room was comfy! View was great. Good location and access to Penn Station.
reviews.negatives: Seems like they’re going through renovations, but it didn’t get in the way of our stay.

reviews.title: Pretty awesome!
reviews.positives: Beds and pillows so comfy, and location was awesome!
reviews.negatives: The glass barnyard slide doors are not too great when you want privacy.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Close to the attraction
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: <My stay here was amazing.  The staff is helpful and always knowledgeable
reviews.negatives: I wish they would provide discounts on frequent stays as I'm here often for work and always have to pay full price which is 1000 or more.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The hotel is nice and situated in the heart of the Mid town Manhattan- great location to explore the city. Rooms are spacious (for the Manhattan standard).
reviews.negatives: The neighborhood (Garmet district) nowadays leaves a lot to be desired in terms of cleaning.

reviews.title: Stay was great and I would definitely recommend this hotel.
reviews.positives: Check-in and checkout was easy. I liked the fact a room key was needed to take the elevator to the floor our room was on. I also liked the location and view.
reviews.negatives: When I was checking out, I got stuck in the elevator on the fifteenth floor. Luckily I pushed the button to open the door and was able to take another elevator.

reviews.title: Great location and very clean and comfortable/spacious room. Will stay again.
reviews.positives: Great location
reviews.negatives: Missing coffee shop

reviews.title: From before, during and after, you will be served in the exact ways you wanted.
reviews.positives: Duke - the concierge! Beyond helpful and very friendly. The reception staff were great and the housekeeping team did an excellent job as well. The bar is great - especially the outdoor section. Fun tip, if the main bar is buys - especially after a show - try the lobby bar. Excellent drinks and they have a relaxing balcony.
reviews.negatives: It was a short stay.

reviews.title: Everything was great!
reviews.positives: Everyone was so nice and helpful from the Bellman when I walked in, to the people at the front desk checking me in.  Check in isn’t until 4 but they allowed me to check in at 1pm which was great since I had been traveling all night.
reviews.negatives: N/A

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Beautiful property. Only disappointment was I paid for a high level with a better view but when I went into my friends non-upgraded room it was larger and had an amazing view. Won’t waste that money again.

reviews.title: Beautiful!
reviews.positives: The view was amazing and the hotel was beautiful and clean. We didn't want to leave.

reviews.title: Amazing location and helpful stuff
reviews.positives: Amazing location, nice stuff, the complimentary alcoholic drinks were refreshing and tasty, the size of the room was perfect

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: No microwave or refrigerator

reviews.title: Great for our purposes, a one night stay to see a show at the garden
reviews.positives: Location was great, property was clean. Very modern facility. Nice that they provided waters to us. Nice to have a fridge in the room.
reviews.negatives: No storage for clothes. Tiny closet, no space to put your clothes

reviews.title: our second time staying here, and we'll be back!
reviews.positives: All staff encountered during our stay were welcoming, very pleasant, and helpful!
reviews.negatives: overall our stay was great. We opted for the skyline view, I just wish there was a way to see the view from each room before booking. no complaints otherwise.

reviews.title: great location
reviews.positives: nice clean great location
reviews.negatives: expensive

reviews.title: Great Hotel especially if you are going to see the Phish at MSG!
reviews.positives: Hotel is located walking distance to MSG, has a great 'roof' top bar, awesome service and a very cool modern design.  My room also haad a nice work area to get stuff done during my trip.
reviews.negatives: The elevator system is unnecessarily complicated.

reviews.title: Thank you for a great place and location to stay in the city!
reviews.positives: As a tourist I was delighted to have the skyline view on the 36th floor.  The room was perfect for what I needed on this visit to my family.
reviews.negatives: Better orientation for this out of towner on what the front entry would be like, from there to go to the elevator and go the sixth floor to check in.  It's an unconventional entry.  I think your website mentions this, but it really needs to be emphasized for tourists from out of time.

reviews.title: Overall great stay
reviews.positives: Great location, great staff
reviews.negatives: Sink had a crack in it that made it look dirty

reviews.title: A great place to stay in New York City!
reviews.positives: Excellent location and very clean. Excellent attentive staff. Great breakfast. Overall atmosphere is superb.
reviews.negatives: No negatives.

reviews.title: We had a great time being close to everything.
reviews.positives: The 2 entrances.
reviews.negatives: The WiFi on the tv would go in and out.

reviews.title: Great stay in a central location in Midtown!
reviews.positives: Clean spacious rooms. Friendly staff.
reviews.negatives: Noise levels at night. Felt like the windows were open with how much sound was coming in.

reviews.title: We had an exceptional stay and experience!
reviews.positives: Everything was wonderful. Staff were pleasant, hotel was beautiful as well as the view.
reviews.negatives: The only thing that would have been better was if I didn't have to cancel my first night and only stay 1 night.

reviews.title: I will stay there again..
reviews.positives: Near to Time Square, Korean town
reviews.negatives: Clean and spacious  and not near to a lot of restaurants..

reviews.title: I had an absolute amazing time.
reviews.positives: The cleanness, the convenience, the staff was amazing and very friendly at check out with helping us with our bags. Holding our luggage & helping with directions.
reviews.negatives: There was nothing to dislike.

reviews.title: Highly recommend for location
reviews.positives:
Location and decor
Rooms were very nice
reviews.negatives: Construction on street

reviews.title: 10/10 would recommend , will definitely be staying again!

reviews.title: Great view of the city.
reviews.positives: Overall, Property was amazing nice and clean.
reviews.negatives: The lobby parking guys were very great and very accommodating.!

reviews.title: Great location and nice hotel- worth the price!
reviews.positives: Clean, very spacious rooms for NYC, high quality toiletries (shampoo, conditioner, lotion) were provided.  Outdoor lounge area was great! Amazing view and nice place for our family with a wide range of ages (16 to 80) to spend a few hours together at the end of the evening.
reviews.negatives: Elevators were slow

reviews.title: Great place when visiting by train or anytime in New York
reviews.positives: Create location to Penn Station. Staff was great hotel was very nice and clean.

reviews.title: Amazing stay, would come back!
reviews.positives: It was very clean, the employees were very nice and helpful, and the view from our room was amazing. The cleaning staff were also very friendly, just wonderful people working here!! We ended up adding another day to our stay here because it was so wonderful:) I think the price is justifiable due to the location, view (on the 26th floor), the maintenance of the building, and the staff!

reviews.title: My husband and I always stay here when we are in the city. So close to MSG and Penn Station. We always have an amazing s
reviews.positives: Modern chic hotel with amazing staff!
reviews.negatives: I love everything about this hotel.

reviews.title: Amazing stay, highly recommend!
reviews.positives: We absolutely loved our stay here. The rooms are spacious and very clean, and the bed is so comfortable. We stayed in a King Room with city view. The staff are all so friendly and the location is amazing - walking distance to time square, 5th avenue and all the main attractions, plus there is a main subway line just on the corner. Highly recommend!

reviews.title: Great place to stay in a wonderful location
reviews.positives: Great bar with good food, was clean, comfy bed, great housekeepers and staff, wonderful location
reviews.negatives: How the elevators worked and would have liked laundry service on Sundays.

A/C worked very well.

reviews.title: I stayed in one of the renovated rooms, which likely contributed to the exceptional experience—stylish, spacious, and qu
reviews.positives: I was in one of the renovated rooms I’m told, so that may have contributed to this exceptional experience, as well.  Friendly staff. Complimentary water.  Awesome view.  Oh, and spacious room!  Oh, and very quiet!  Stylish.  Didn’t get a chance to enjoy the other multitude of amenities (including complimentary drinks in evening) but it was exciting to see!
reviews.negatives: Loved it all!
